title: Consumption per DK10 Industry Code, Region and Year (Energinet)
description:
[Publisher: Energinet] Yearly consumption of industries divided by municipality code and DK10 industry code, which is based on Statistics Denmark.

The dataset is updated yearly in the first quarter of the year.
To comply with laws regarding the protection of private data, **methods for anonymizing data have been applied**. This dataset uses number and dominance as a criterion for confidentiality. The number criteria is set to 20 and the dominance criteria is set so that 2 units combined maximum may contain 90 percent per year. 
In case of the criteria being exceeded, the dataset will combine data columns or aggregate data columns to a high level in the following order: 
1. Regions being combined and/or aggregated
2. DK10 codes being combined
3. Years being combined
